rationale: The cited paper appears only once, in an introductory grouped citation that lists examples of prior work on how psychological or physiological states can influence behavior. The citing article does not engage Dai and Hsee (2013)'s ownership-based wish-versus-worry account, and it is not used to motivate specific hypotheses, mechanisms, or methods in the serotonin studies. This indicates a general background reference rather than a distinct functional dependency.
